parameters.end: ={{ $("Merge Context After Availability").first().json.ctx.end_time || new Date(new Date($("Merge Context After Availability").first().json.ctx.start_time).getTime() + 60*60000).toISOString() }}
parameters.summary: ={{ `Reserva: Provider ${$("Merge Context After Availability").first().json.ctx.provider_id}, Service ${$("Merge Context After Availability").first().json.ctx.service_id}` }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO bookings (provider_id, service_id, start_time, end_time, idempotency_key, gcal_event_id, user_id, status, created_at) VALUES (
  {{ $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.provider_id }}::int,
  {{ $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.service_id }}::int,
  {{ $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time }}::timestamptz,
  {{ $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.end_time || '2026-03-24T13:32:00.000Z' }}::timestamptz,
  '{{ $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.idempotency_key.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text,
  {{ $('Create GCal Event').isExecuted && $('Create GCal Event').first().json.id ? "'" + $('Create GCal Event').first().json.id + "'" : 'NULL' }}::text,
  {{ $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.user_id || $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.chat_id }}::bigint,
  'CONFIRMED',
  NOW()
) RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all();

={
  "provider_id": {{ $('Create DB Booking').first().json.provider_id }},
  "service_id": {{ $('Create DB Booking').first().json.service_id }},
  "start_time": "{{ $('Create DB Booking').first().json.start_time }}",
  "chat_id": "{{ $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.chat_id }}",
  "dlq_type": "GCAL_CREATE",
  "error_reason": "{{ $('Create GCal Event').isExecuted ? ($('Create GCal Event').first()?.json?.error?.message || 'GCal Error') : 'Circuit Breaker Open' }}"
}

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all();

parameters.query: SELECT id, status, gcal_event_id FROM bookings WHERE idempotency_key = $1::text LIMIT 1;

parameters.summary: ={{ `Reserva: Provider ${$("Merge Context After Availability").first().json.ctx.provider_id}, Service ${$("Merge Context After Availability").first().json.ctx.service_id}` }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO bookings (provider_id, service_id, start_time, end_time, idempotency_key, gcal_event_id, user_id, status, created_at) VALUES ($1::int, $2::int, $3::timestamp, $4::timestamp, $5::text, $6::text, $7::bigint, 'CONFIRMED', NOW()) RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.provider_id, $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.service_id, $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time, $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.end_time || new Date(new Date($('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time).getTime() + 60*60000).toISOString(), $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.idempotency_key, ($('Create GCal Event').isExecuted && Object.keys($('Create GCal Event').first()?.json || {}).length > 0 && !$('Create GCal Event').first()?.json?.error) ? $('Create GCal Event').first().json.id : null, $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.user_id || $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.chat_id] }}
